# Summit Drywall

> Licensed and insured commercial drywall subcontractor serving Utah's Wasatch Front. Summit Drywall specializes in mid-scale commercial drywall work for general contractors and is the subcontractor of choice for firms including Rimrock and Jacobson.

## About
Summit Drywall is a commercial drywall subcontractor focused on mid-scale commercial projects — from ground-up construction to tenant improvements. We are known for delivering clean finishes, holding tight schedules, and the professionalism that keeps us on general contractors' call lists.

## Services
- Drywall Hanging — precision board installation on commercial-scale projects of any size, height, and complexity
- Mudding & Taping — expert joint finishing to spec, including Level 3, 4, and 5 finishes
- Acoustic Ceilings — drop ceilings and acoustic tile systems for commercial and institutional interiors
- Steel Framing — light-gauge steel stud framing for interior partition walls and exterior curtain wall systems

## Service Area
- Utah: Weber County, Davis County, Salt Lake County, Utah County
- Surrounding areas considered on a case-by-case basis

## Credentials
- Licensed
- Insured
- Commercial-focused subcontractor
